name: Side Plank
image_match: Side Bridge (closest match — same movement, different name)
form_cues: Stack feet, straight line from ankle to head
Lift hips — don't let them sag
notes: Anti-lateral flexion. Target_reps stores seconds per side; do both sides per set.
video_id_query: Side Plank how to proper form
instructions: Lie on your side with legs stacked, prop yourself on the forearm of the bottom arm.
Elbow goes directly under the shoulder. Top arm can rest on hip or extend toward ceiling.
Lift your hips off the floor so your body forms a straight line from ankles to shoulders.
Hold for the prescribed time, then switch sides.
